title: Ship implementation acquisition surfaces and rollout execution content
summary: Records release evidence for the new implementation landing page, the implementation generic dashboard comparison page, and the rollout-execution blog that ties customer usage, release history, and weekly reviews into one onboarding and rollout workflow.

ops.rollback_plan: Revert the implementation landing page, implementation comparison entry, rollout-execution blog content, and release-evidence manifest in tokvera-dashboard and tokvera if the positioning or SEO direction needs to change.
